narrative:
Tallmadge 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,092 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
